motifs.name: Step-fret (key) pattern
motifs.shape_notes: Orthogonal stair-stepped turns; nested rectangles; good for borders.
motifs.generative_hint: Create a polyline that alternates horizontal/vertical segments with quantized lengths; mirror for symmetry; tile in bands.

motifs.name: Glyph block
motifs.shape_notes: Compact modular symbol inside a bounded block; often with inner subdivisions.
motifs.generative_hint: Use a grid subdivision (3x3 to 7x7) and fill cells with rectangles/hooks/S-curves; add an incised outline channel around the block.

motifs.name: Feather bundle
motifs.shape_notes: Repeating tapered strokes grouped like a fan.
motifs.generative_hint: Radial array of tapered quads with slight noise in angle; outline as a single carved silhouette; internal grooves for separations.

motifs.name: Serpent S-curve
motifs.shape_notes: Sinuous body with strong silhouette; often segmented.
motifs.generative_hint: Use a spline centerline; extrude width; segment with repeating notches; add head as a geometric hook + eye socket circle.

motifs.name: Sun disk (simple)
motifs.shape_notes: Concentric rings with radial ticks; use sparingly.
motifs.generative_hint: Concentric circles + quantized radial spikes; erode edges with noise; carve grooves between rings.
